# EliteDrop

## Site
- Name: EliteDrop
- URL: https://www.elitedrop.net.in/
- Summary: Premium handbags, watches, shoes, wallets, sunglasses, and accessories with secure checkout and fast delivery.

## Audience
- Shoppers in India looking for premium fashion and accessories.

## Content and Pages
- Home: Product discovery, categories, featured and trending collections.
- Products: Listing and filters by category and price.
- Product Details: Images, pricing, and purchase options.
- About: Brand story and quality focus.
- Contact: Support channels and working hours.
- Policies: Shipping, return, and privacy policy pages.

## Brand Voice
- Confident, premium, and helpful.
- Clear pricing, delivery timelines, and trust signals.

## Preferences for AI Use
- Prefer concise summaries with concrete details (products, categories, timelines).
- Use official URLs and cite policy pages when referencing returns, shipping, or privacy.
- Avoid speculation about pricing or availability; refer users to live product pages.
